result.stdout:
Kentico.Xperience.DbManager 31.3.2+f3a9608a88ebc340ac953c5456a21b8cc84dce78
(c) 2026 Kentico Software. All rights reserved.

  -s, --server-name                Required. Name of the SQL server to connect
                                   to.

  -d, --database-name              (Default: xperience) Name of the database to
                                   create.

  -u, --username                   Username used for SQL server authentication.
                                   If not provided, windows authentication is
                                   used to connect to the SQL server.

  -p, --password                   Password used for SQL server authentication.

  -a, --admin-password             Required. Sets the password for the default
                                   'administrator' account.

  --hash-string-salt               Custom salt used for the hash function to
                                   create the macro signatures.

  --verbose                        Indicates if verbose logging is enabled.

  --recreate-existing-database     Indicates if the database is recreated if it
                                   already exists. Otherwise use
                                   '--use-existing-database' option or the
                                   installation is terminated.

  --use-existing-database          Indicates if the database should be used if
                                   it already exists. Otherwise use
                                   '--recreate-existing-database' option or the
                                   installation is terminated.

  --license-file                   The absolute or relative path of the license
                                   file containing the license key for the site.

  --connection-timeout             (Default: 60) Database connection timeout in
                                   seconds.

  --sample-website-domain          (Default: localhost) The domain to be
                                   configured for the sample website.
                                   'Localhost' will serve as the default value
                                   if not provided. The option is ignored if no
                                   sample website exists in the database.

  --sample-email-service-domain    The Email service domain set for the sample
                                   email channel. Use this parameter if you want
                                   to override the default 'dancinggoat.ai'
                                   service domain for the sample email channel.
                                   The parameter is ignored if no sample website
                                   exists in the database.

  --instance-friendly-name         Represents the instance in Client Portal. If
                                   left empty, a default numeric identifier is
                                   used instead. Friendly names may only contain
                                   letters, numbers, spaces, and the special
                                   characters: .,?!|'\/-_

  --help                           Display this help screen.

  --version                        Display version information.

staticCommands.name: install
staticCommands.description: Install the database for Xperience by Kentico.

options.description: Sets the password for the default 'administrator' account.
Name of the SQL server to connect to.
Name of the database to create.
Custom salt used for the hash function to create the macro signatures.
Represents the instance in Client Portal. If left empty, a default numeric identifier is used instead. Friendly names may only contain letters, numbers, spaces, and the special characters: .,?!|'\/-_
The absolute or relative path of the license file containing the license key for the site.
Password used for SQL server authentication.
Indicates if the database is recreated if it already exists. Otherwise use '--use-existing-database' option or the installation is terminated.

The Email service domain set for the sample email channel. Use this parameter if you want to override the default 'dancinggoat.ai' service domain for the sample email channel. The parameter is ignored if no sample website exists in the database.
The domain to be configured for the sample website. 'Localhost' will serve as the default value if not provided. The option is ignored if no sample website exists in the database.
Indicates if the database should be used if it already exists. Otherwise use '--recreate-existing-database' option or the installation is terminated.
Username used for SQL server authentication. If not provided, windows authentication is used to connect to the SQL server.
Indicates if verbose logging is enabled.
